doc: One-shot trigger sampler. Send /voicer/notes [midi, gate] to play (e.g. [57.0, 1.0] plays at natural pitch; [69.0, 1.0] an octave up). Each of the 4 voices is a hosted `sampler-voice` sub-patch: a note's gate fires the 'blip' sample (recorded pitch MIDI 57, ~220 Hz) and its pitch shifts the playback rate. The voicer allocates notes across the voices and sums their audio.

nodes.doc: Hosts 4 sampler-voice sub-patches; allocates notes across them and sums their audio.
